episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 394: Magiccon Vegas Merch For Everypony
episode.description: James & Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and talk over the possible gainers from Magiccon Vegas merch and the new My Little Pony Secret Lair.
